name: Maxwell Fleming
subtitle: Motel & Hospitality Manager • Accommodation Operations • Guest Services
tagline: Reliable leadership, smooth operations, and genuinely great guest experiences.
proBio: Experienced Motel and Hospitality Manager with a strong background in accommodation operations, guest services, team leadership, and business administration. Proven ability to manage day-to-day motel operations, oversee staff, coordinate reservations, maintain high guest satisfaction standards, and drive business performance. Skilled in customer service, problem-solving, financial administration, and creating positive guest experiences while ensuring efficient and professional operations.
